name: pull-critique-replacement-2026-06
notes: Pre-registered BEFORE scoring. Seeded classes plus holdout cases drawn from the 0.22.0 automated-run misses (the gap this set closes).

cases.description: A JSON reader crashes on invalid UTF-8 instead of returning not-ok
A temp dir is created before the try/finally so cleanup can leak on failure
The Major bug the 0.22.0 automated run missed: run_test mkdtemp escaped the try/finally
The second Major bug the 0.22.0 automated run missed: contract_gate did not guard UnicodeError
